scripts.bench:with-skills: bun run prepare-skills && bun run src/index.ts --mode with-skills
scripts.bench:all: bun run prepare-skills && bun run src/index.ts --mode with-skills && bun run src/index.ts --mode without-skills
scripts.bench:with-skills:debug: bun run prepare-skills && bun run src/index.ts --mode with-skills --debug
